subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath quaffed the wine of tribulation from the chalice of destiny in the path of God, the Lord of Names, that he may rejoice [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن شرب رحیق البلاء من کاس القضاء فی سبیل الله مالک الاسماء لیفرح
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @justice and wrath of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
